Energy Affordability and Summer Health
Cold Temperature, Housing, and Health

title: Yusuke Okano
text:
I am a Ph.D. student in Economics at Hitotsubashi University.
My research interests are in health economics, environmental economics, and applied microeconometrics. My current research studies how climate adaptation mitigate health burden.
